body_txt: This is when a character has an overwhelming fear of something that someone of their kind just shouldn't be afraid of. For example, a bird who's afraid of heights or a mermaid who's afraid of water. Often, they get an episode or subplot dedicated to resolving this fear. Almost always Played for Laughs , although there will often be a dramatic moment where they are forced to confront said fear. These can often be considered Absurd Phobias . May be part of a "What Do They Fear?" Episode . Compare Why Did It Have to Be Snakes? , in which the thing that the character fears pops up at an unexpected and inconvenient moment, rather than being something that constantly confronts them. If a character is afraid of something they are , they're a Boomerang Bigot . If they become the thing that they fear, it's a Karmic Transformation .
